name: 捷昌驱动
sector: Layer3_新能源车/humanoid 共性部件

aleabit.layer_label: Layer 3 — Linear actuator / humanoid joint drive
aleabit.thesis: Jiecang makes electric linear actuators for standing desks and medical beds, now repositioning as a humanoid-robot linear-joint vendor. Linear actuators are a real chokepoint sub-component for humanoids (you cannot just buy these off the shelf), and the mcap sits inside the sweet spot. Risk: the humanoid revenue is still a story. Worth a watch list slot, not a high-conviction yet.

signals.name: 供应链汇聚
signals.note: Few CN vendors with humanoid-grade actuator stack

signals.name: 分析师覆盖率 < 3
signals.note: Coverage rising on humanoid theme but still moderate

signals.name: 技术深度门槛
signals.note: Lead screw, motor pairing, control firmware integration

signals.name: 小盘 + 关键产能
signals.note: ~RMB 11B mcap sits in the strike zone
